name: Provable diffusion-based posterior sampling for linear inverse problems via DDIM

description: arXiv:2607.19333v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Diffusion-based methods have achieved remarkable empirical success in solving inverse problems. However, many existing posterior samplers either lack rigorous theoretical guarantees or incur substantial computational overhead. We propose a simple and efficient algorithm, called \pddim, for solving linear inverse problems with diffusion priors vi...
author: Yuchen Jiao, Na Li, Changxiao Cai, Yuxin Chen, Gen Li
